scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @espanaia/shared-types && npm run build --workspace @espanaia/seed-data && npm run build --workspace @espanaia/official-connectors && npm run build --workspace @espanaia/api && npm run build --workspace @espanaia/web && npm run build --workspace @espanaia/desktop
scripts.package:desktop: npm run build:desktop-icon && npm run build && npm run prepare:desktop && npm run package --workspace @espanaia/desktop
scripts.package:native-macos: npm run build && npm run prepare:desktop && node scripts/package-native-macos.mjs
